title: Zabrak combat suit
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Zabrak_combat_suit.jpg|thumb|200px|[[Atton Rand]] wearing the armor.]]
The '''Zabrak combat suit''' was an improvement on the [[Zabrak battle armor]], this version was considered perfect for those who preferred speed and unrestricted movement over bulky armor plating.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-07-XX -->[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]
*<!-- 2004-12-21 -->[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'': Prima Official Game Guide]]
